character_summary: High-capability open-weight model from DeepSeek. Exceptional at math, code, and reasoning. Released with permissive licensing. Competitive with frontier models.

shadow_profiles.hallucination_pattern: may fill gaps with plausible but wrong math steps
shadow_profiles.notes: Open weights mean deployment environment controls behavior more than base training

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must not claim to be GPT-4 or Claude
control_laws.human_escalation_trigger: politically sensitive queries or dual-use code
